# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      environment:
        description: Target environment
        required: true
        type: choice
        default: dev
        options:
          - dev
          - staging
          - prod

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: deploy-${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}-${{ inputs.environment || 'dev' }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

env:
  ARTIFACT_NAME: build-artifacts
  ARTIFACT_PATH: dist

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      actions: read
    outputs:
      artifact_name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Build
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          mkdir -p "${ARTIFACT_PATH}"
          ./scripts/build.sh

      - name: Upload artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_PATH }}
          if-no-files-found: error
          retention-days: 14

  deploy_dev:
    name: Deploy (dev)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: ${{ (github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && inputs.environment == 'dev') || (github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') }}
    environment:
      name: dev
    permissions:
      contents: read
      actions: read
    steps:
      - name: Checkout (for deployment scripts)
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact_name }}
          path: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_PATH }}

      - name: Deploy
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          chmod +x ./scripts/deploy.sh
          ./scripts/deploy.sh dev "${ARTIFACT_PATH}"

  deploy_staging:
    name: Deploy (staging)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: deploy_dev
    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && inputs.environment == 'staging' }}
    environment:
      name: staging
    permissions:
      contents: read
      actions: read
    steps:
      - name: Checkout (for deployment scripts)
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_PATH }}

      - name: Deploy
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          chmod +x ./scripts/deploy.sh
          ./scripts/deploy.sh staging "${ARTIFACT_PATH}"

  deploy_prod:
    name: Deploy (prod)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: deploy_staging
    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && inputs.environment == 'prod' }}
    environment:
      name: prod
    permissions:
      contents: read
      actions: read
    steps:
      - name: Checkout (for deployment scripts)
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_PATH }}

      - name: Deploy
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          chmod +x ./scripts/deploy.sh
          ./scripts/deploy.sh prod "${ARTIFACT_PATH}"
